name: Vahanna Tech Edge Acquisition I Corp. Units
summary: Vahanna Tech Edge Acquisition I Corp. Units are units consisting of one Class A ordinary share and one-half of one redeemable warrant of Vahanna Tech Edge Acquisition I Corp., a blank check company (SPAC). The company is focused on identifying and acquiring a business in the technology sector. Vahanna Tech Edge Acquisition I Corp. is based in New York, USA.
